channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytippng, 8th April
item.description:
Fridge freezer has been dumped and is in a dangerous position.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 362, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in the pavement causing a trip/fall hazard to people, 8th April
item.description:
Neighbours at no33 dug up the pavement when doing building work to their home and left a hole in the pavement. The hole is big enough to catch your foot and cause a trip fall. The hole has been there for several months. No33 occasionally hide it with a traffic cone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadworks, no works ongoing, significant disruption, 8th April
item.description:
Roadworks ongoing with no work being carried out. Notice says these should have ended on 7th April. Have passed this section of the road at various times in the last few days and the disruption to traffic given the position next to 3 junctions and a cross road traffic lights is significant. The roadworks remain in place today and there is still nothing being done at the site (just a hole, no workers present except for a car)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 233, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial waste not collected for days, 8th April
item.description:
Things have got bad again. Why isn’t the commercial waste from Micky’s chippy collected every day as it should be.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abusive graffiti, 8th April
item.description:
Someone has drawn the racist graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, Health Hazard & Vermin at end of Fortune Walk (SE28 0EL), 8th April
item.description:
Fly-tipped rubbish on the public footpath at the end of Fortune Walk, at the junction with Garrick Drive (SE28 0EL). Whoever closed our original report is lying. Picture taken right now!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chamberlain Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Front of estate communal area, 8th April
item.description:
Household items left for collection ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Aberdour Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampard Grove / Magaret st, 8th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left outside 4 Kinnaird House 115 Chatham Street, 8th April
item.description:
Rubbish left outside house 4 115 chatham street for about a month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned since 2nd March. Causing issues at bus stop and traffic, 8th April
item.description:
Car not left in safe place, too far away from the curb. Forcing cars and buses to give way to oncoming traffic. Difficult for busses to stop safely at bus stop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged bus stop BA, 8th April
item.description:
The timetable holder on bus stop BA (opposite Sainsbury's) is damaged.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tent on grass mound - still there, 8th April
item.description:
Reported on 3/4/26. Advised park warden would investigate. Occupants of tent urinating in bushes near tent. Rubbish on site. Please escalate issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayliss Avenue, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside of this property, 8th April
item.description:
These items have been there for weeks now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa cushions dumped near overflowing bin in green., 8th April
item.description:
Small green at the bottom of Mendip close se26 has been there for days. Bin not emptied for weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collingtree Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing Bollard, 8th April
item.description:
A metal Bollard has been knocked over and is missing on the foot paths at the side of Millwall Football ground. The footpath runs parallel to the railway line.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Senegal Way, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hyperoptic box making a loud noise, 8th April
item.description:
The hyper optic box DP1A on the ground floor of 1-18 Grenfell House is making an extremely loud fan noise and the door of the cabinet appears to be broken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Comber Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toilet dumped, 8th April
item.description:
Toilet left on street several days ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Shad Thames, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stairwell lighting broken in 1-18 Grenfell House, 8th April
item.description:
Lights not working on all floors making stairwell dark and dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Comber Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned, 8th April
item.description:
There has several reports submitted by the public of the stationary car that has been in the parking bay for more than 4 weeks. This officially meets a key national criterion for being "abandoned," regardless of its tax status. Under the Refuse Disposal (Amenity) Act 1978, Bromley Council has a statutory duty to remove any vehicle that appears to be abandoned . It is significantly damaged, unroadworthy (e.g., flat tyres, broken mirrors, scratched etc).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rodway Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire footway blocked by unlawful A board sign, 8th April
item.description:
The entire footway, used by a large number of blind and visually impaired pedestrians and wheelchair users going to Moorfields Eye Hospital, is obstructed by this unlawful A board sign.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): East Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
